TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-frog_dungi

S.FORM: u labi tu tahkal tu ku bulad.
S.TRANSL: 晚上月亮出來了。
At night, the moon came out.

S.FORM: u zuma kuni kakapah.
S.TRANSL: 這特別好。
It was specially good.

S.FORM: ayza a demiad kina labi sa kina wawa sa pate pazeng han niza kya balaut nu nipahabayan niza i tini i kuleng.
S.TRANSL: 今天晚上這小孩把他養的青蛙放在這甕裡。
Tonight the child put the frog he raises into this jug.

S.FORM: ya wacu sa tu tanunamuhsa maidih a sicabay kiza balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗很高興想要和那隻青蛙做朋友。
That dog was very happy and wanted to make friends with that frog.

S.FORM: sa mabi’ tu kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩和狗在睡覺。
That child and dog were sleeping.

S.FORM: sa ya balaut han tu maidih ciniza a tahkal a midang.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙想要出來玩。
That frog wanted to come out and had fun.

S.FORM: sa macukat sa tu kya wawa a tya wacu sa inayi' tu a maazih kya balaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩和那隻狗醒來沒有看到那隻青蛙。
That child and that dog woke up and did not see that frog.

S.FORM: matawid aca kuheni sakalamkamsa tu kuheni a miadad tu tututuud u nu luma’ a mikilim tiza balaut.
S.TRANSL: 他們也嚇一跳，趕快翻家中的所有物品找那隻青蛙。
They were shocked too and in a hurry rummaged around the house so as to find the frog.

S.FORM: ya wacu han tu patalabu han niza kya tangah niza i labu nya kuleng.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗把頭放進甕裡面。
That dog put its head inside of the jug.

S.FORM: sa nika ya kuleng ca’ay tu kaales.
S.TRANSL: 但（他）是不能拿掉那甕。
But (he) could not get rid of that jug.

S.FORM: sa malatupel tu niza wacu.
S.TRANSL: 就變成狗的帽子了。
It became the dog’s hat.

S.FORM: ya wawa han tu buhat sa tu tuniyan u sa sasaedeb sa a miawaw tya wawa bah balaut a mikilim tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩打開那門呼喊著青蛙找尋青蛙。
That child opened the door, yelled and searched for the frog.

S.FORM: nika ya wacu sa madebay makaiza sasaedeban sa.
S.TRANSL: 但是那隻狗從門上跌下來。
But that dog fell off the door.

S.FORM: mapeci’ tu amin kiza kuleng.
S.TRANSL: 那甕破了。
That jug was broken.

S.FORM: sa ya wawa han tu matawid tu sa kalamkamsa maduba’ tayza a miabubu tiza wacuan sa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩嚇一跳趕快跑去抱那隻狗。
That child was shocked, ran fast to there and held that dog in the arms.

S.FORM: tu tahkal sa tu kuheni.
S.TRANSL: 然後就到外面。
Then they went out.

S.FORM: i liwliw nu luma’ i kilakilangan tu a mikilim tiza balaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 在家的四周及樹叢中找青蛙。
They searchd for the frog around their house and in the bushes.

S.FORM: azih sa kuheni tiza i pabaw yadah kiza wadu sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們往上看到很多蜜蜂。
They looked up and saw many bees.

S.FORM: alaw si pa sidibu wa sidibu i tiza Eza iza i kilang pabaw nya kilang.
S.TRANSL: 原來在那個樹上有蜂巣。
Originally there was a hive in the tree.

S.FORM: sa ya wacu han tu maidih ciniza a tayza mikayakay sa a miala tya dibu nya nya wadu sa.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想要爬過去摘蜂巣。
The dog wanted to crawl over there and took the hive.

S.FORM: nika ma…ma…ma…tawid ciniza kwa kalaten nya wadu nya wadu kiza wacu.
S.TRANSL: 但那隻狗嚇一跳，因為被蜜蜂螫了。
But that dog was shocked because it was stung by a bee.

S.FORM: ya wawa han tu sa izaw ku buhang Eza sa ciniza ku tayza ciniza a miazih sa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子去那邊看那個洞。
That child went there and looked at that hole.

S.FORM: matawid ciniza alaw u buhangay nu edu kya buhang sa.
S.TRANSL: 他很驚訝因為那個洞是老鼠洞。
He was surprised because that hole was a mouse hole.

S.FORM: ma…pelu’ tu kya dibu nya watu sa.
S.TRANSL: 摘那個蜂巢。
He removed that beehive.

S.FORM: ma malinges amin kya wadu.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂全部都很生氣。
All of the bees were angry.

S.FORM: sa ya wawa han tu sa maazih niza ku buhang i tiza i kilang.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩看到那邊有樹洞。
That child saw a tree hole there.

S.FORM: mikayakay ciniza tayza a mikilim tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去找那青蛙。
He climbed up and found that frog.

S.FORM: sa azih han u palang sa matawid ciniza matulu’ ciniza madebay ciniza na makaiza i kilang sa.
S.TRANSL: 他看到老鷹嚇一跳就跌下來。
He saw an eagle and fell off the tree.

S.FORM: tanuangic sa tu kiza wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩一直哭。
That child was crying.

S.FORM: mikayakay tya ungcung sa.
S.TRANSL: （他）爬那顆大石頭。
(He) climbed that rock.

S.FORM: u kilang tu na sa ciniza.
S.TRANSL: 他原本以為是樹。
He thought that was a tree.

S.FORM: kapet sa ciniza mananuan sa.
S.TRANSL: 他一抓而（它）會動。
He grabbed but (it) moved.

S.FORM: melaw azih han niza alaw u puhungay nya sizi.
S.TRANSL: 他一看原來那是羊角。
He saw it, which was a horn.

S.FORM: sa maca’it tu kya wawa i puhung nya sizi.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子掛在羊角上。
That child was hung on a horn.

S.FORM: tu ba’tung han tu nya sizi kiza wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那山羊把孩子丟出去。
That goat threw that child out.

S.FORM: sa tu tukud han nya sizi kiza wacu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻山羊把狗踢走。
That goat kicked off that dog.

S.FORM: madebay kuheni tini i sasa nya tepad sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到懸崖下。
They fell down the cliff.

S.FORM: madebay kuheni tayza i taku.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到池塘裡。
They fell into a pond.

S.FORM: adasay aca inayay ku ba’tu.
S.TRANSL: 幸好沒有石頭。
Luckily, there was no stone.

S.FORM: cay kaduka kina wacu a tya wawa sa.
S.TRANSL: 那狗和孩子沒受傷。
That dog and child were not hurt.

S.FORM: ma smal mas sa tengil sa kuheni i tiza.
S.TRANSL: 他們在那裡聽著。
They were listening over there.

S.FORM: matengil nuheni ku suni nina balaut.
S.TRANSL: 他們聽到這青蛙的聲音。
They heard the sound of this frog.

S.FORM: sa izaw sa tu mikayakay kuheni tya sike sikela’ sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬上漂流木。
They climbed up the driftwood.

S.FORM: satanunamuhsa kiza wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子很高興。
That child was happy.

S.FORM: sa tu matengil nu zuma a balaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 其他青蛙聽到了。
Other frogs heard (it).

S.FORM: i nyu tu a amin kya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 全部的青蛙都來了。
All of the frogs came.

S.FORM: ya yadah sa tu kya balaut i tiza sa.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡就有很多青蛙。
Here were many frogs.

S.FORM: tanunamuhsa kuheni kya wacu a tina wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那狗跟那孩子很高興。
That dog and that child were very happy.

S.FORM: ala han tu nuheni kya cabay nuheni kya cabay nuheni.
S.TRANSL: 他們抓了他們的朋友。
They caught their friends.

S.FORM: ya balaut a taluma sa.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙要回家。
That frog was going home.

S.FORM: sakapahen tu ku uzip sa tu kiza wawa tu zuma a balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩跟其他青蛙說 “保重身體！”。
That child told other frogs, “Take care!”
